fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace" /> matching the specified CICP parameters, or <see langword="null" /> if the combination is not supported.
fields.summary: Creates a color space from CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) color primaries and transfer function identifiers.

params.transferCharacteristics: The CICP value identifying the transfer function.
params.colorPrimaries: The CICP value identifying the color primaries.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace CreateCicp (SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp colorPrimaries, SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp transferCharacteristics);
